name: i2i-yield-watch-scraper
description: Automated i2iFunding high-yield loan intelligence scraper

scripts.test: node -e "const s = require('./scorer'); console.log('Score:', s.calculateYieldScore({interestRate:81.9,creditScoreNumeric:553,monthlyIncome:30000,fundingRemaining:27,loanAmount:16313})); console.log('Priority:', s.getPriority(81.9))"

author: Chirag Singhal
